overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Batman: Arkham Knight showing the character walking along an elevated industrial bridge walkway during a stormy night. The camera follows Batman as he moves across the structure with gothic stone arches behind and a large industrial tower ahead, with the Miagani Island sign visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated industrial bridge walkway beneath stone arch

agents.ego_description: Batman walks steadily along the narrow elevated walkway, cape billowing behind him, moving away from the large stone arch structure

entered.detail: Large gothic stone arch framing the walkway entrance with ornate metal detailing
Metal grated walkway with red painted safety railings extending forward into the distance
Red painted metal railings running along the left edge of the walkway
Red painted metal railings running along the right edge of the walkway
Tall dark industrial tower with spiked antenna structures at the top, visible ahead
Green metal truss bridge structure running parallel to the walkway on the right
Distant city lights visible through the bridge structure below the walkway

segments.scene_description: Batman walks along a narrow elevated industrial walkway beneath a large stone archway. The path features red safety railings and metal grating, with a massive industrial tower visible in the distance ahead and city lights glowing below through the bridge structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated walkway approaching central industrial tower with navigation signage

events.description: Green navigation sign reading 'MIAGANI ISLAND' appears in the upper right corner of the view

agents.ego_description: Batman continues walking forward along the walkway, approaching the central industrial tower structure as the stone arch falls behind

entered.detail: Glowing green street sign reading 'MIAGANI ISLAND' mounted high on the right side structure

segments.scene_description: As Batman continues along the walkway, the stone arch passes behind him and a glowing green 'MIAGANI ISLAND' sign appears in the upper right. The central industrial tower looms closer ahead, and the metal truss bridge on the right moves into the near foreground as the camera advances steadily forward.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along an elevated industrial walkway that transitions from the shadow of a gothic arch toward a looming industrial tower. It begins with Batman walking across metal grating and red safety railings beneath a massive stone archway, with city lights glowing far below the bridge structure. As he advances, the stone arch recedes behind him and a glowing green Miagani Island sign emerges in the upper right of the frame. The scene then shifts as the central industrial tower looms larger ahead, while the metal truss bridge on the right moves into the near foreground.
